commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 11:20 And Abishai the brother of Joab, he was chief of the three: for lifting up his spear against three hundred, he slew them, and had a name among the three. His name is written without the middle i, in all this book. Alexandrian Septuagint alone reads, "six. Hebrew adds, "not "evidently mistaking lo, "not "for lo, "ei. "See 4 Kings viii. "He lifted up his spear against 300 soldiers, and had a name among Three. "(Kennicott).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
